Text.Page:
Hmm. It seems that your legend isn't spreading far and wide like I'd thought it would. They probably just need to see even more impressive victories.

I'd previously asked you to win in Kumasylum five times, but since that didn't leave as big an impression as we'd hoped, I want you to go back out there and win seven times! That'll show them what you're made of.
Perfect! Now everyone will know the name "<PCNAME>"!
